global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with product boxes and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting a sale on bestsellers with a significant discount.

elements.label: Solid green background
elements.description: A vibrant solid green background fills the entire canvas, creating a fresh and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: Three product boxes
elements.description: Three rectangular product boxes with a glossy finish, each featuring a reflective surface and slightly tilted to show depth.

elements.label: Discount offer text
elements.description: Bold, white text stating 'Up to 40% off Shop bestsellers now' prominently displayed in the center of the ad.
elements.text_content: Up to 40% off Shop bestsellers now

elements.label: CrispBox logo
elements.description: A simple, modern logo reading 'CrispBox' in a clean font, positioned at the top left corner.

elements.label: Order now button
elements.description: A bright button with the text 'Order now' in bold, inviting font, located at the bottom center of the ad.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small, circular badge in yellow with the word 'SALE' in bold black text, positioned at the top right corner.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small, white label with the text 'UGC' in a bold font, located at the top left corner.
